contract.title: Freelance Service Agreement – Brand Refresh 2025
contract.preamble: This Freelance Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of January 15, 2025 (the "Effective Date"), by and between TechStartup Inc., a California corporation, with its principal place of business at [Client Address], acting through its Marketing Director, Sarah Johnson (the "Client"), and Chen Creative Studio, a California professional entity, with its principal place of business at [Freelancer Address], acting through its Senior Designer, Alex Chen (the "Freelancer"). Individually, each may be referred to herein as a "Party" and collectively as the "Parties."

clauses.title: Definitions
clauses.content:
1.1 "Services" means all creative design, consultation, and deliverables described in Section 2 of this Agreement.
1.2 "Project" refers to the Brand Refresh 2025 project as described in the recitals above.
1.3 "Deliverables" means the specific items detailed in Section 2.2 below.
1.4 "Confidential Information" means any nonpublic information or materials disclosed by either Party in connection with this Agreement.

clauses.title: Scope of Services and Deliverables
clauses.content:
2.1 The Freelancer shall provide the following services: complete visual identity redesign including logo, color palette, typography, and design of a brand guidelines document.
2.2 The Freelancer shall deliver the following Deliverables according to the following schedule:
   (a) Logo concepts (3 options), due January 30, 2025
   (b) Selected logo refinement, due February 15, 2025
   (c) Brand guidelines document, due March 1, 2025
   (d) Asset package delivery, due March 15, 2025

clauses.title: Timeline and Milestones
clauses.content:
3.1 The Project shall commence on the Effective Date and conclude upon delivery of the final asset package on or before March 15, 2025, unless terminated earlier in accordance with Section 11 of this Agreement.
3.2 All Deliverables shall be completed and provided to the Client in a timely manner according to the schedule set forth in Section 2.2.
3.3 Time is of the essence in the performance of this Agreement.

clauses.title: Payment Terms
clauses.content:
4.1 The total fee for Services provided under this Agreement shall be Eight Thousand Five Hundred U.S. Dollars ($8,500).
4.2 The Client shall pay the Freelancer a deposit of $2,550 upon execution of this Agreement. The deposit is non-refundable except in the case of uncured breach by Freelancer under Section 11.
4.3 Payments for Deliverables shall be made according to the following milestone schedule:
   (a) $2,000 upon delivery of logo concepts (3 options), due January 30, 2025
   (b) $1,500 upon delivery of selected logo refinement, due February 15, 2025
   (c) $2,500 upon delivery of the brand guidelines document, due March 1, 2025
   (d) $2,500 upon delivery of the asset package, due March 15, 2025
4.4 All invoices are due within fourteen (14) days of receipt. Late payments shall accrue interest at the rate of 1.0% per month, or the maximum permitted by law, whichever is less.

clauses.title: Revisions
clauses.content: 5.1 The Client is entitled to up to three (3) rounds of revisions for each major Deliverable as outlined in Section 2.2. Any additional revision requests beyond three (3) rounds per Deliverable shall be billed at the Freelancer's standard hourly rate of $150 per hour, subject to the Client's prior written approval.

clauses.title: Intellectual Property Assignment
clauses.content:
6.1 Upon full payment of all fees, the Freelancer hereby assigns to the Client all rights, title, and interest, including all copyrights, in and to the final versions of the Deliverables (excluding any pre-existing proprietary materials and tools of the Freelancer).
6.2 Prior to full payment, all intellectual property rights remain vested in the Freelancer.
6.3 Freelancer retains the right to display Deliverables in portfolios and for self-promotional purposes, provided that such use does not disclose Client Confidential Information or infringe on Client’s trademarks.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.content:
7.1 Each Party agrees to maintain as confidential all Confidential Information disclosed in connection with this Agreement, and not to use or disclose such information except as required to perform its obligations under this Agreement.
7.2 This Section shall survive termination of the Agreement.

clauses.title: Independent Contractor Status; AB5 Compliance
clauses.content:
8.1 The Parties acknowledge and agree that the Freelancer shall perform all Services as an independent contractor. Nothing in this Agreement shall be construed to create any partnership, joint venture, employer-employee, or agency relationship between the Parties.
8.2 The Parties agree to comply with the requirements of the California Labor Code AB5 and the ABC test as set out in California law. The Freelancer has the autonomy to control and direct the manner and means by which the Services are performed.

clauses.title: Limitation of Liability
clauses.content:
9.1 EXCEPT FOR WILLFUL MISCONDUCT OR GROSS NEGLIGENCE, IN NO EVENT SHALL EITHER PARTY BE LIABLE TO THE OTHER FOR ANY SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL, INDIRECT OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES ARISING OUT OF THIS AGREEMENT.
9.2 THE FREELANCER'S TOTAL LIABILITY FOR ANY AND ALL CLAIMS ARISING UNDER THIS AGREEMENT SHALL NOT EXCEED THE TOTAL AMOUNT PAID BY CLIENT UNDER THIS AGREEMENT.

clauses.title: Warranties and Disclaimer
clauses.content:
10.1 Freelancer warrants that the Services shall be performed in a professional and workmanlike manner and, to Freelancer's knowledge, shall not infringe or misappropriate any third party rights.
10.2 EXCEPT AS EXPRESSLY PROVIDED HEREIN, ALL SERVICES AND DELIVERABLES ARE PROVIDED "AS IS," WITHOUT ANY ADDITIONAL WARRANTY, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED.

clauses.title: Termination and Cancellation
clauses.content:
11.1 Either Party may terminate this Agreement upon fourteen (14) days’ prior written notice to the other Party.
11.2 Upon termination, Client shall pay Freelancer for all Services rendered and costs actually incurred up to the effective date of termination. Any non-refundable deposit shall be credited against such amounts due.
11.3 If either Party breaches any material provision and fails to cure such breach within ten (10) business days after receipt of written notice, the non-breaching Party may terminate this Agreement immediately.
11.4 Upon termination, Freelancer shall deliver to Client all work completed to date, subject to payment obligations.

clauses.title: Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
clauses.content:
12.1 This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California, without regard to its conflicts of law principles.
12.2 Any disputes arising under or related to this Agreement shall be submitted to binding arbitration under the rules of the American Arbitration Association, with the venue exclusively in the county where the Client maintains its principal place of business in California.
12.3 Each Party shall bear its own legal fees and costs, except as otherwise ordered by the arbitrator. Judgment on any arbitration award may be entered by any court of competent jurisdiction.

clauses.title: General Provisions
clauses.content:
13.1 Entire Agreement. This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the Parties and supersedes all prior or contemporaneous agreements or understandings, whether oral or written, relating to its subject matter.
13.2 Amendment. Any amendment or modification to this Agreement must be in writing and signed by both Parties.
13.3 Assignment. Neither Party may assign this Agreement or any rights or obligations hereunder without the prior written consent of the other Party.
13.4 Notices. All notices under this Agreement shall be in writing and shall be delivered personally, by overnight or certified mail, or by electronic mail with delivery confirmation, to the addresses specified by each Party.
13.5 Severability. If any provision of this Agreement is held void or unenforceable, such provision will be severed, and the remainder of the Agreement will remain in full force and effect.
13.6 Counterparts. This Agreement may be executed in counterparts, each of which shall be deemed an original, but all of which together shall constitute one and the same instrument.
13.7 No Waiver. The failure of either Party to enforce any provision of this Agreement shall not constitute a waiver of future enforcement of that or any other provision.

contract.title: Freelance Service Agreement
contract.preamble: This Freelance Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of January 15, 2025 ("Effective Date"), by and between TechStartup Inc., a California corporation, acting through Sarah Johnson, Marketing Director ("Client"), and Chen Creative Studio, a California entity, represented by Alex Chen, Senior Designer ("Freelancer").
contract.recitals: WHEREAS, Client desires to engage Freelancer to perform certain visual identity design services for the project titled "Brand Refresh 2025"; and WHEREAS, Freelancer has the expertise and agrees to perform such services under the terms and conditions set forth herein; NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and promises contained herein, the parties agree as follows:

clauses.title: Definitions
clauses.content:
1.1 "Project" refers to the Brand Refresh 2025 visual identity redesign including logo, color palette, typography, and brand guidelines document.
1.2 "Deliverables" means the tangible items set forth in Section 3 to be delivered by Freelancer to Client.
1.3 "Effective Date" means January 15, 2025, the date this Agreement becomes effective.
1.4 "Revisions" means modifications made by Freelancer after Client’s review, limited to the number specified in Section 6.

clauses.title: Scope of Services
clauses.content: Freelancer shall perform professional design services necessary to complete the Project as described in this Agreement. Services include creation of logo concepts, selected logo refinement, brand guidelines document, and final asset package delivery as further detailed in the Deliverables.

clauses.title: Deliverables and Timeline
clauses.content:
3.1 Freelancer shall deliver the following items according to the schedule and payment amounts below:
  a) Logo concepts (3 options) - Due on January 30, 2025 - $2,000
  b) Selected logo refinement - Due on February 15, 2025 - $1,500
  c) Brand guidelines document - Due on March 1, 2025 - $2,500
  d) Asset package delivery - Due on March 15, 2025 - $2,500
3.2 Freelancer shall use commercially reasonable efforts to meet the delivery deadlines. Time is of the essence for this Agreement.

clauses.title: Payment Terms
clauses.content:
4.1 The total Contract price shall be $8,500.
4.2 Client shall pay an initial deposit of $2,550 upon execution of this Agreement.
4.3 Remaining payments shall be made upon completion of each milestone as listed in Section 3.
4.4 Freelancer shall invoice Client for each milestone. Payment is due within fifteen (15) calendar days of invoice date.
4.5 Late payments are subject to interest at the rate of 1.5% per month or the maximum permitted by California law, whichever is less.

clauses.title: Revisions
clauses.content: Client is entitled to three (3) rounds of revisions per Deliverable. Additional revisions will be billed separately at Freelancer’s standard hourly rate, subject to prior Client approval.

clauses.title: Intellectual Property Ownership
clauses.content:
6.1 Upon full payment, Freelancer assigns to Client all worldwide rights, title, and interest in the Deliverables created exclusively for the Project.
6.2 Freelancer retains no rights to use the Deliverables except for portfolio and marketing purposes, provided Client’s confidential information is not disclosed.
6.3 Freelancer represents that the Deliverables will be original work and will not infringe any third party intellectual property rights.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.content: Each party agrees to keep confidential and not disclose any proprietary or confidential information of the other party without prior written consent, except as required by law or as necessary to perform this Agreement.

clauses.title: Cancellation and Termination
clauses.content:
8.1 Either party may terminate this Agreement upon ten (10) days written notice if the other party breaches any material term and fails to cure within such period.
8.2 Upon termination, Client shall pay Freelancer for all work performed and expenses incurred up to the termination date.
8.3 Sections 6 (Intellectual Property Ownership), 7 (Confidentiality), 9 (Limitation of Liability), 10 (Governing Law), and 11 (General Provisions) shall survive termination.

clauses.title: Limitation of Liability
clauses.content: Except for damages arising from gross negligence or willful misconduct, neither party shall be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of this Agreement. Freelancer’s total liability shall not exceed the total fees paid by Client under this Agreement.

clauses.title: Independent Contractor Status
clauses.content: Freelancer is an independent contractor and not an employee, partner, or agent of Client. Freelancer shall comply with California’s ABC test under Assembly Bill 5 (AB5) and any applicable labor laws. Freelancer shall be solely responsible for all taxes, insurance, and benefits related to Freelancer’s performance under this Agreement.

clauses.title: Governing Law and Venue
clauses.content: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California, without regard to its conflict of law principles. Any disputes arising under this Agreement shall be resolved exclusively in the state or federal courts located in the County of San Francisco, California.

clauses.title: General Provisions
clauses.content:
12.1 Entire Agreement: This Agreement constitutes the entire understanding of the parties and supersedes all prior agreements, understandings, and communications.
12.2 Amendments: Any modification or amendment must be in writing and signed by both parties.
12.3 Severability: If any provision is held unenforceable, the remainder shall remain in full force and effect.
12.4 Waiver: No waiver of any breach shall be deemed a waiver of any subsequent breach.
12.5 Assignment: Neither party may assign this Agreement without prior written consent of the other party.
12.6 Notices: All notices shall be in writing and sent to the parties’ addresses or emails indicated in this Agreement or as updated in writing.

contract.title: Freelance Service Agreement
contract.preamble: This Freelance Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of January 15, 2025 ("Effective Date"), by and between Sarah Johnson, Marketing Director of TechStartup Inc. ("Client"), and Alex Chen, Senior Designer of Chen Creative Studio ("Freelancer").
contract.recitals: WHEREAS, Client desires to engage Freelancer for the Brand Refresh 2025 project involving a complete visual identity redesign; WHEREAS, Freelancer has the expertise and agrees to provide such services upon the terms and conditions set forth herein.

clauses.title: Scope of Work
clauses.content: Freelancer agrees to perform the services described in Exhibit A ('Scope of Work') attached hereto, which includes: 1.1 Visual identity redesign including logo, color palette, typography, and brand guidelines document ('Project').

clauses.title: Deliverables and Timeline
clauses.content: Freelancer shall deliver the following: 2.1 Logo concepts (3 options) due January 30, 2025. 2.2 Selected logo refinement due February 15, 2025. 2.3 Brand guidelines document due March 1, 2025. 2.4 Asset package delivery due March 15, 2025.

clauses.title: Compensation and Payment
clauses.content: 3.1 Total Payment: Client agrees to pay Freelancer $8,500 for completion of the Project. 3.2 Deposit: A non-refundable deposit of $2,550 shall be paid upon execution of this Agreement. 3.3 Payment Schedule: Payments are to be made upon completion of each milestone as follows: - $2,000 upon delivery of logo concepts, - $1,500 upon selected logo refinement, - $2,500 upon delivery of brand guidelines, - $2,500 upon asset package delivery.

clauses.title: Revisions
clauses.content: Freelancer agrees to provide up to three (3) rounds of revisions per deliverable. Additional revisions will be billed at an hourly rate agreed upon by both parties prior to commencement.

clauses.title: Intellectual Property Assignment
clauses.content: Upon full payment, Freelancer assigns to Client all rights, title, and interest in and to the final deliverables, excluding any third-party materials and underlying tools, subject to the terms of this Agreement.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.content: Each party agrees not to disclose any confidential information received from the other party to any third parties, except as necessary to perform the services outlined in this Agreement.

clauses.title: Cancellation and Termination
clauses.content: Either party may terminate this Agreement upon written notice if the other party breaches a material term of this Agreement and fails to cure such breach within ten (10) days after receipt of written notice.

clauses.title: Limitation of Liability
clauses.content: In no event shall either party be liable to the other for any indirect, special, incidental, or consequential damages arising out of or in connection with this Agreement.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.content: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California, without regard to its conflict of law principles. Any legal proceedings arising out of this Agreement shall be brought in the courts of the County of [Insert County], California.

clauses.title: General Provisions
clauses.content: 10.1 Entire Agreement: This Agreement, together with any exhibits or schedules, constitutes the entire agreement between the parties. 10.2 Amendments: Any amendments must be in writing and signed by both parties. 10.3 Waiver: No waiver of any breach of any provision of this Agreement shall constitute a waiver of any prior, concurrent, or subsequent breach of the same or any other provisions hereof.
